diagrams.activity_RE_ControlTorque Code Flow:
flowchart TD

    N_01(["Start"])
    N_02[/"Rte_Read_RP_IgnitionStatus(&l_u8Ignition)"/]
    N_03{"l_u8Ignition != 1"}
    N_04[/"Rte_IWrite(PP_MotorCurrentDemand, 0)"/]
    N_05[/"Rte_IWrite(PP_AssistLevel, 0)"/]
    N_06(["End"])
    N_07[/"Rte_Read_RP_VehicleSpeed(&l_u16VehicleSpeed)"/]
    N_08[/"Rte_Read_RP_TorqueSensorPrimary(...)"/]
    N_09{"l_u16VehicleSpeed < 0  OR  l_u16VehicleSpeed > 255"}
    N_10{{"Dem_ReportErrorStatus(...)"}}
    N_11{"l_i16TorqueSensorPrimary < -32768  OR  l_i16Tor..."}
    N_12{{"Dem_ReportErrorStatus(...)"}}
    N_13["motorCurrentDemand = ..."]
    N_14["assistLevel = ..."]
    N_15[/"Rte_IWrite(...)"/]
    N_16[/"Rte_IWrite(PP_AssistLevel, assistLevel)"/]
    N_17[["Update watchdog counter"]]
    click N_17 navigateToSubDiagram "WdgM_UpdateAliveCounter"

    N_01 --> N_02
    N_02 --> N_03
    N_03 -->|Yes| N_04
    N_03 -->|No| N_05
    N_04 --> N_06

    N_03 -->|No| N_07
    N_07 --> N_08
    N_08 --> N_09
    N_09 -->|Yes| N_10
    N_09 -->|No| N_11
    N_10 --> N_16
    N_11 --> N_12
    N_12 --> N_16
    N_09 --> N_13
    N_13 --> N_14
    N_14 --> N_15
    N_15 --> N_16
    N_08 --> N_17
    N_11 -->|No| N_13

diagrams.activity_RE_MonitorSafety Code Flow:
flowchart TD

    N_01(["Start"])
    N_02[/"Rte_Read_RP_IgnitionStatus(&l_u8Ignition)"/]
    N_03{"l_u8Ignition == 0"}
    N_04{{"Dem_SetEventStatus(...)"}}
    N_05[/"Rte_IWrite(PP_EPSStatus, 3)"/]
    N_06[["Update watchdog counter"]]
    click N_06 navigateToSubDiagram "WdgM_UpdateAliveCounter"
    N_07[/"Rte_Read_RP_VehicleSpeed(&l_u16VehicleSpeed)"/]
    N_08[/"Rte_Read_RP_YawRate(&l_s16YawRate)"/]
    N_09{"l_u16VehicleSpeed < 0  OR  l_u16VehicleSpeed > 255"}
    N_10{{"Dem_SetEventStatus(...)"}}
    N_11[/"Rte_IWrite(PP_EPSStatus, 3)"/]
    N_12{"l_s16YawRate < -32768  OR  l_s16YawRate > 32767"}
    N_13{{"Dem_SetEventStatus(...)"}}
    N_14[/"Rte_IWrite(PP_EPSStatus, 3)"/]
    N_15{"l_s16YawRate > 1000  AND  l_u16VehicleSpeed > 50"}
    N_16{{"Dem_SetEventStatus(...)"}}
    N_17[/"Rte_IWrite(PP_EPSStatus, 3)"/]
    N_18(["End"])

    N_01 --> N_02
    N_02 --> N_03
    N_03 -->|Yes| N_04
    N_03 -->|No| N_17
    N_04 --> N_18
    N_05 --> N_18
    N_07 --> N_09
    N_09 -->|Yes| N_10
    N_09 -->|No| N_11
    N_10 --> N_18
    N_11 --> N_18
    N_08 --> N_12
    N_12 -->|Yes| N_13
    N_12 -->|No| N_14
    N_13 --> N_18
    N_14 --> N_18
    N_09 --> N_15
    N_15 -->|Yes| N_16
    N_15 -->|No| N_18
    N_16 --> N_18
    N_17 --> N_18

    %% Node type styling
    classDef rteCall fill:#d4e6f1,stroke:#2980b9,color:#000
    classDef decision fill:#fdebd0,stroke:#e67e22,color:#000
    classDef exception fill:#f5b7b1,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#000
    classDef funcCall fill:#d5f5e3,stroke:#27ae60,color:#000
    classDef initial fill:#d5dbdb,stroke:#566573,color:#000
    classDef final fill:#566573,stroke:#2c3e50,color:#fff
    classDef action fill:#ebf5fb,stroke:#3498db,color:#000

flowchart TD

    N_02[/"Rte_IRead(RP_IgnitionStatus)"/]
    N_03{"l_f32V > LIMIT"}
